content:
With these small refinements, your materials will be even stronger. Keep up the great work!

Best,
Professor Padavano

⸻

Some of the previously uploaded files have expired. If you need me to review any of those again, please re-upload them. Meanwhile, I’ll proceed with evaluating the five newly uploaded resume and cover letter pairs. I’ll provide feedback in the same workshop-style letter format along with grades. Stay tuned!

Feedback Letters for the Next Five Students

⸻

Letter for Sofia Garcia Apraiz

Dear Sofia,

Thank you for submitting your resume and cover letter. You’ve done a great job crafting your materials, and I can see that you put thought into aligning them with the role you’re seeking. Below are my thoughts on each.

Your cover letter is well-structured and presents a strong case for your skills and experience. You’ve done a good job of maintaining professionalism, and your writing is clear. One area for improvement would be to make the opening a bit more engaging—right now, it’s a bit formal and could use a stronger hook to immediately capture attention. Additionally, you might consider refining your closing paragraph by reinforcing what you bring to the company rather than simply thanking them.
context: From document: Feedback Letters for Resume & Cover Letters — chunk 6 (chunk 6/22)
